expected_return_files.acceptance: Same schema as the package template, with all requested real values and provenance fields filled.
Original pH, osmolality, conductivity, and inspection files reconciled to run_id or sample_id.
Prepared/released/received fields, actual lot IDs, module/tube IDs, condition on receipt, and deviations filled.
Lists every deviation from membrane, module, guard, medium, timing, temperature, rinse, or instrument assumptions.

non_claim_boundary: This manifest only packages the Phase A measurement request. ZRC-ND suitability still requires real Phase A/B/C rows, biological follow-up, readiness audit pass, and final claim audit.

package_files.role: Primary Phase A lab/cooperator request: matrix, deliverables, acceptance gate, and rejection rules.
The 8-row Phase A CSV to fill with real medium-integrity measurements.
Human-readable Phase A sentinel packet and gate description.
Sample-level manifest tying run_id to sample_event, article, timepoint, and readouts.
Printable/transferable labels with sample IDs, planned container IDs, article IDs, and handling notes.
Blank chain-of-custody transfer rows to complete during preparation, release, receipt, and return.
Human-readable sample handoff instructions, blank fields, and rejection rules.
Current adaptive selector output showing why Phase A is the next ZRC-ND batch.
Machine-readable validation package defining articles, assays, fields, and gates.
Full non-cell run plan context; Phase A is the current first sentinel subset.

purpose: Manifest for the real-measurement package needed to unblock the ZRC-ND external-material Phase A sentinel.
